privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new SuiteCRM contract populated with specific synthetic details. The expected contract name ('Annual Maintenance Agreement 2024'), target account ('Westfield Industrial Supplies'), status ('Signed'), start date ('2024-07-01'), end date ('2025-06-30'), and value limits (47900 to 48100, targeting 48000) are all explicitly defined in the task description and verifier logic. The target account is synthetically seeded into the database via setup_task.sh.
